title: Duality
description: Duality adds a variety of classes for the player to choose from, each with their own unique abilities
body:
# Welcome to Duality  
Duality aims to add a plethora of player classes!  
Each class has a collection of unique abilities and armor!  
Each armor will also have a variety of recolors/skins, most will be  
free for all to use..  While others may be hidden behind advancements.
*Note This is Beta Release 1*

### Meet the Plague Doctor
The plague doctor has the ability to store, and redisperse wither, slowness, and weakness.  
You are immune to all negative effects, and can spoil food.  
Be careful around heat, the cleansing power of fire hurts more than the average bear.  
Upon death, all of your stored plagues explode out of you into an AOE attack.

### The Shadow Assassin  
The shadow assassin recovers its mana when shrouded in darkness.  
You have the ability to vanish, and leap.  But not only that, your special armor can also  
vanish along with you. Giving you true invisiblity.  
Careful though, if you are spotted dealing or taking damage, your shroud will be undone!  
As an assassin you have a permanent speed buff, and while shrouded you deal 2x damage to your victims, if you manage to hit them in the back!

### Meet the Bard  
The bard is meant to be a fun class to play!  
by yourself, you are next to useless.  However, you can shift click up to two allies, 
any song you cast will effect them aswell as yourself.  
Song of Rest - Infinite regen until *you* deal damage  
Clense - Removes *All* potion effects  
Bardic Inspiration - Attacks deal an additional 20% Damage  

The bard regenerates its mana thru a suspciously familiar minigame!

### And Others  
We aim to continue adding many classes, with "crusader, dreadknight, and arcanist" currently in the works for release 2.

### Todo  
As this is a Beta *release*, there are many features that are unimplemented, this mod is not yet ready for survival play.

To select your class /duality classC "bard/shadow/plaguedoctor"
